content:
Exploring the Nexus of AI & QA: Weekly Insights — 22/06/2026 to 05/07/2026

5 min read
1 hour ago

--

In this week’s Playwright Chronicles: Crafting Elegant Automation in JS/TS from Scratch, we continue evolving our framework with practices that make automation both elegant and maintainable.
After restructuring our scripts into the Page Object Model format, we took the next step by externalizing test data into JSON files, replacing hardcoded values with structured datasets for each page. This shift not only improves scalability but also keeps our scripts clean and adaptable.
Then, we explore how to design array elements inside JSON test data, access specific objects within them. This approach transforms repetitive checks into a streamlined, data‑driven workflow, making your automation framework more powerful and professional.
What’s Inside This Week’s Roundup:
Playwright Chronicles: Crafting Elegant Automation in JS/TS from Scratch — Part 27: Restructure Your Tests the Smart Way by Embracing the Page Object Model (Part 1)
